title: Microsoft Baseline Security Mode
contentHtml:
In this episode Michael and Sarah talk with guests Sophie Ke () and Dave Minasyan () about Microsoft Baseline Security Mode, a new feature to help ease security settings.
We also discuss Azure Security news about Microsoft 365 E7, Microsoft 365 Copilot, Azure Blob Storage SFTP, Azure Database for PostgreSQL, and new Confidential VM types.
